supported_devices: built-in variable-speed peristaltic pump for pH dosing
port_types: BNC pH probe, temperature probe, peristaltic pump outlet
compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC), Bluelab temperature probe
recommended_use_note: pH dosing with Wi-Fi remote monitoring and control via Edenic app; single-direction pH dosing; upgraded variable-speed pump vs older Connect model
uvp_notes: Official Bluelab EU store price €630 incl. VAT. Some EU retailers list higher (growmart.eu €749; led-grower.eu €559.96 — possible sale). US website lists $660 USD.
notes: Model BCTPHC02. Built-in variable-speed peristaltic pump up to 120 ml/min (vs 10 ml/min on older CONTPH/CONTPHCON). Single-direction pH dosing (pH-up OR pH-down, user-selectable). pH range 0.0-14.0, resolution 0.1, accuracy ±0.1 at 25°C. Temperature 0-50°C, accuracy ±1°C. Built-in Wi-Fi (can be disabled in settings) + Bluetooth for Edenic app pairing. OTA firmware updates. Remote monitoring, control, alarms, and history via Edenic by Bluelab app (Android 8.0+ / iOS 12+). Power supply: 100-240V AC input, 5VDC 1.5A output. 2 m probe cable, 4 m acid-resistant dosing tube. Replaceable pH probe and pump cassette. CE/FCC/RoHS certified. 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand. Sold out on bluelab.com at time of research but in stock at eu.bluelab.com.
